titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Raoul Vaneigem Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

conventiondeclaration.citation: translation missing: en.enumerations.resource_finding_aid_description_rules.Describing Archives: A Content Standard

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Saturday March 24, 2018 at 20:46

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Correspondence, writings, printed material, personal papers, photographs, and other papers by or relating to Raoul Veneigem. Collection is in French.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains four notebooks: January 1950, December 1952, July 1952 (diary of a trip to England), and 1953 (professional notebook from Raoul Vaneigem's father).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Révoltes et Révolutionnaires; Notes on Georges Bataille, Sartre, Henri Lefebvre, André Gorz, and Fascisme et grand captial, by Daniel Guérin; Notes on anarchy, Lautréamont in his century, Satre, Lefebvre, and eroticism; Notes on gnosticism, aesthetics of Baudelaire, Breton's L'Art magique, Shakespeare, bibliographies of Lautréamont and his time, anarchism.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: a notebook with poems (1954); Poems and prose fragments (1952-1959); drafts of "Lern" / "Isly Fray" and other writings (1958); drafts of "Le Périple", "Le Succube", and erotic drawings.

did.unittitle: Raoul Vaneigem's master's thesis on Lautréamont

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: "Isidore Ducasse. Comte de Lautréamont" (1956); carbon copy of master's thesis; notes, drafts, bibliography, etc. for master's thesis.

did.unittitle: Raoul Vaneigem's master's thesis on Lautréamont

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts, bibliography, etc. for master's thesis.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: paper presented by Raoul Vaneigem during the second year of his bachelor's degree.

did.unittitle: Lecture notes by Raoul Vaneigem and mimeographed course material

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains some poems.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: appointments, addresses, and scattered notes on literature and private matters.

did.unittitle: Notes on Isidore Isou, "Introduction à une nouvelle poésie et à une nouvelle musique"

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: poems and poetry fragments.

did.unittitle: Banalités de base pour une recherche méthodique

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outline and notes for "Banalités de base"; "Traite de SVO"; drafts to 1995 reprint; letters to publisher.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts and versions of the unpublished text.

did.unittitle: Traité de savoir-vivre à l'usage des jeunes générations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes for Traité; autograph notes and typed first drafts; German translation of Traité.

did.unittitle: Traité de savoir-vivre à l'usage des jeunes générations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: mimeographed edition of the Traité.

did.unittitle: Traité de savoir-vivre à l'usage des jeunes générations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: mimeographed edition of the Traité.

did.unittitle: Traité de savoir-vivre à l'usage des jeunes générations

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes from an early draft.

did.unittitle: Littérature et dépassement Etude de la créativité littéraire et de ses rapports avec la vie quotidienne dans l'oeuvre de Lautréamont, Mallarmé et Breton, doctoral dissertation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: final draft of the first part of Raoul Vaneigem's dissertation.

did.unittitle: Littérature et dépassement Etude de la créativité littéraire et de ses rapports avec la vie quotidienne dans l'oeuvre de Lautréamont, Mallarmé et Breton, doctoral dissertation

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts, correspondence and documents related to Raoul Vaneigem's scholarship; Reading notes, books on poetry and social history.

did.unittitle: Various texts by Raoul Vaneigem from the Situationist years

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: 11 black and white photographs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: "Ouvriers, employés, intellectuels, Le pouvoir est entre vons mains..."; "Antagonisme et notre raison d'être"; "Fiche spéciale"; "Art socio-expérimental"; "Le livre de François George...".

did.unittitle: Prototype of Guy Debord's Jeu de la guerre / Kriegspiel

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: metal game board and game pieces.

did.unittitle: Guy Debord, Propositions de règles pour le kriegspiel

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: the first draft of text accompanying the "Jeu de la guerre / Kriegspiel" wargame developed by Guy Debord.

did.unittitle: Guy Debord and Raoul Vaneigem as copywriters
Detourned erotic photograph annotated by Guy Debord
Other documents from the Situationist years

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: black and white photograph of J.V. Martin (1966); autographed notes from Attila Kotányi; Robert Dehoux. Declaration de principe du Pouvoir Ouvrier Belge (1961); Der Fragebogen; Notary act confirming Raoul Vaneigem as publisher of Der Deutsche Gedanke (25 April 1963); autographed notes; weekly planner for 1963, annotated "Espagne 1963"; reading list - "Que faut-il avoir lu avant 25 ans?".

did.unittitle: Photocopies of unpublished internal SI documents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photocopies of 43 internal documents.

did.unittitle: Réactions psycho-sociales des ouvriers mineurs dans la perspective d'une cessation prochaine de leurs activités

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: project summary, and a letter from Alain Touraine (20 March 1962).

did.unittitle: Terrorisme ou révolution, preface for Pour la Révolution, by Ernest Coeurderoy (Paris, Editions Champ Libre, 1972)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outlines, notes, drafts and half-finihsed chapters.

did.unittitle: Le bon dieu dans la merde (unpublished)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: an outline, notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Ratgeb, De la grève sauvage à l'autogestion généralisée

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts. Raoul Vaneigem published this under the pseudonym of Ratgeb.

did.unittitle: Towards a sequel of the Traité (unpublished)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: a notebook, and extensive notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Questions aux prolétaires sur la façon de se faire baiser et d'y échapper (unpublished)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts and potentially finished version.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outline, notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outline, notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outline, notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outline, notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outline, summary and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: excerpts from Latin texts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: photocopies of typescript, with corrections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: typescript with corrections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: typescript with corrections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: typescript and notes, outlines and drafts.

did.unittitle: Adresse aux vivants sur la mort qui les gouverne et l'opportunité de s'en défaire

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts and a fragment of the final version.

did.unittitle: Adresse aux vivants sur la mort qui les gouverne et l'opportunité de s'en défaire

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts and a fragment of the final version.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: manuscript.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts, and two intermediate and one final version.

did.unittitle: Lettre de Staline à ses enfants réconciliés de l'Est et de l'Ouest

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outline and summary, notes, drafts and proofs.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Written under pseudonym of Tristan Hannaniel. Contains: notes and photocopies of proposed illustrations.

did.unittitle: La Résistance au christianisme, Les Hérésies des origines au XVIIIe. siècle

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: first version with notes, as well as a corrected version. Also contains final (?) version.

did.unittitle: La Résistance au christianisme, Les Hérésies des origines au XVIIIe. siècle

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and documention.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: typescript of final version, with corrections.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts, as well as several different versions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outlines, notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Les Plaisirs et les ombres. Dérives d'ambiances/Carte blanche à Raoul Vaneigem

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts and a final version of the exhibition.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Dictionnaire de citations pour servir au divertissement et à l'intelligence du temps
Dictionnaire de citations pour servir au divertissement et à l'intelligence du temps
Dictionnaire de citations pour servir au divertissement et à l'intelligence du temps
Dictionnaire de citations pour servir au divertissement et à l'intelligence du temps
Dictionnaire de citations pour servir au divertissement et à l'intelligence du temps
Pour une Internationale du genre humain

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Déclaration des droits de l'être humain. De la souveraineté de la vie comme dépassement des droits de l'homme

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: summary, notes and a draft.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Pour l'abolition de la société marchande. Pour une société vivante

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Le Chevalier, la Dame, le Diable et la Mort

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes.

did.unittitle: Rien n'est sacré, tout peut se dire. Réflexions sur la liberté d'expression

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes.

did.unittitle: Modestes propositions aux grévistes, pour en finir avec ceux qui nous empêchent de vivre en escroquant le bien public

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: an outline / summary, notes and a corrected final draft, and a drawn map of "this anti-town."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and a final draft.

did.unittitle: Entre le deuil du monde et la joie de vivre

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Ni pardon ni talion (La question de l'impunité dans les crimes contre l'humanité)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Ni pardon ni talion (La question de l'impunité dans les crimes contre l'humanité)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes related to voyage to Mexico.

did.unittitle: Lettre à mes enfants et aux enfants du monde à venir

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

did.unittitle: Les Cueilleurs de mots, illustré par Gabriel Lefebvre

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts and manuscripts, as well as reproductions of illustrations.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: 'Lecture' in Madeleine Bourdouxhe, La Femme de Gilles (1985); 'L'Ordure et le jardin' in C. De Silguy, La Saga des ordures du moyen âge à nos jours (1989); Salut à Coeurderoy (1991); Faut-il avoir peur du national-communisme? (1992); 'Vous qui entrez, laissez tout désespoir' in: I. Ducasse, Poésies. Paris: Mille et une nuits (1995); 'Brèves remarques sur le stade éthique' in Alain Mamou-Mani, Au-delà du profit : comment réconcilier Woodstock et Wall Street (1995); 'Éloge de la paresse affinée' in Les Péchés capitaux, I: La Paresse (1996); Préface' in L'Art de ne croire en rien suivi de Livre des trois imposteurs (2002); En deça du miroir (2002); Utopia ou le livre de corps du devenir humain (undated); Notes for various introductions.

did.unittitle: Contributions to Encyclopédie du Monde Actuel (EDMA)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: La poésie française, de 1945 à nos jours (1971 September); Le Surréalisme, une révolution de l'irrationnel (1968 September); contribution notes; and Encyclopédie du Monde Actuel (EDMA) filing cards.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: lists of subjects, notes, and drafts.

did.unittitle: Diary style notes and dream reports

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Erotic fragments (circa 1966); "Parfois il était resplendissant de rage," (circa 1960s); "Lectures de délassement passionnant …"; Le 18 février 1972; "Elle s'obstinait à ne pas comprendre..." (circa 1970s); Aide-mémoire (1985 June-July); Untitled (circa 1980s-1990s); Dream reports (1964); "Il était, quand je l'ai rencontré, de ce feu...", (1994 November-December); "Visite de Nonna et Nonno..." (1998 September); Hymne à la triple déesse (undated).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, as well as "Agenda Banque Nagelmackers 1973."

did.unittitle: Three Opéras de rue pour marionnettes et orgues de barbarie

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, drafts, summaries for lyrics and drafts for musical scores. Also contains "Avanti pupulo," "Le petit Johannes," and a treatment for "Nils l'ingénu."

did.unittitle: Encyclopédie des plaisirs et des déplaisirs (unpublished)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: an outline, summary and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outline and summary, notes and documentation.

did.unittitle: Trente ans qui ont changé le monde ou De la mutation et des raisons d'en jouir (unpublished)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: outlines, notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: drafts, summary, and documentation.

did.unittitle: Projet d'un dictionnaire des hérésies (work in progress)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, documentation and drafts.

did.unittitle: Projet d'un dictionnaire des hérésies (work in progress)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, documentation, and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, documentation, and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, documentation, and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, documentation, and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, documentation, and drafts.

did.unittitle: Projet d'un dictionnaire des hérésies (work in progress)

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, documentation, and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes and proposal.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: summary, notes and drafts.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, and documentation with comments.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: excerpts and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes, summaries and drafts for several unfinished novels. These include "Sur les rives lointaines de la planète Amour," "Pays d'approche (Sur les rives lointaines de la planète Amour)," "Un printemps à Venise/Lagune," "Les derniers jours de Paris," and "Les explorateurs du temps perdu."

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Abaixo o estado [under the condition] (1974); Notes on Fourier (circa 1970s); Bibliothèque curieuse (circa 1970s); Histoire d'un tableau sans histoire (circa 1970s); "Notes pour une biographie du Chevalier de la Barre" (circa 1970s); Notes sur la littérature wallonne (circa 1970s); Reading notes on Castaneda (circa 1973); Notes sur la seconde perception (circa 1980s); Rapport sur les perspectives d'avenir dans une société qui n'en a plus guère (circa 1980s); Les influences du mouvement anarchiste sur les lettres belges dans les dernières décennies du XIXème siècle (1988); Guide des itinéraires artistiques et littéraires (circa 1980s); Mémoire liminaire pour Thèse de doctorat sur travaux (circa 1985); Homme de Dieu et homme du Diable (circa 1988); L'usurpateur (1992); 1967 (1994); L'ère du malaise (circa 1988); Anthologie des penseurs de la liberté en Europe (circa 1998); On George Orwell (1994); L'exploitation par l'image (circa 1990s); Une ville pour vivre autrement (circa 1990s); "Notes sur la mort de mes chats Vodka et Groseille assassinés par les chasseurs" (1992); Joli mai. Le printemps du monde a commencé en mai (circa 1988); L'Internationale Situationniste (1998); Thèses sur la fin de l'économie d'exploitation et la création d'une société humaine (circa 1998).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Essais (circa 1998); Le gentil loup Pilou (1998); L'Enfant et la ville (2000); Origines du christianisme (circa 2003); Le christianisme est-il fondé sur une imposture historique (undated); La pensée radicale des situationnistes (2003); Démocratie directe contre démocratie corrompue. Quels enseignements tirer de l'expérience zapatiste? (2005); Le spectacle continue ou Le grand charivari (2006); Le terrorisme intellectuel (circa 2010); Notes for "Un moment d'éternité dans le passage du temps" (2010-2011); Notes désordonnées pour servir aux prochaines discussions lors des rencontres d'Athènes (2013 October); Speech given at a colloquium on libertarian ideas and practice, Athens (2013); Notes for Vincent Meessen and Katerina Gregos (2014); Notes on madness (2014); L'avenir est un pari sur le présent (undated); N'êtes vous que des poires? (undated); L'Apprentissage de la gratuité (undated); Ils ont la cinquantaine bien sonnée... (undated); Il était une fois un pays (undated);Outline of a book on the 'Belgian disease' (undated); La petite chèvre turbulente (undated); Premier livre de lecture pour la libération des enfants (undated); Notes for "Raoul Collectif" (2015); Le temps des mutations. Projet d'une société humaine sans représentation ni contrainte (circa 1980s); Notes related to "autogestion" (undated).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: screenplay.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: screenplay

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: screenplay.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: screenplay.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: script.

did.unittitle: Film on the Marquis de Sade

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: script, with notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: Les OEillets rouges d'avril (1974); Bolibar (1970s); Le Château des spectres (1970s); La Maison dans le désert (1970s); Beaumarchais (1970s); Il faut que ça va! (1970s); Michaux ou la quête originelle (circa 1992); Fatwa (1993-1994); Leonardo (undated); Untitled (undated); Tuez-vous les uns les autres! (circa 2002); L'Ancre de miséricorde (undated); Les puces (undated); Esquisse d'un traitement (undated); Qu'est-ce qu'on attend pour vivre un peu? (undated).

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: notes on composers, lists of pieces of classical music, lyrics to songs, and musical notation.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: reading lists, catalogues, and notes.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: mixed collection of notes, observations and sentences.

did.unittitle: 'De la souveraineté et du mépris de l'amour' in André Le Chapelain, Comment maintenir l'amour,

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: documentation for a reprint of "De amore".

did.unittitle: 'De la souveraineté et du mépris de l'amour' in André Le Chapelain, Comment maintenir l'amour

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: documentation for a reprint of "De amore".

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: excerpts and photocopies.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: excerpts and photocopies.

did.unittitle: Adresse aux vivants sur la mort qui les gouverne et l'opportunité de s'en défaire
Lettre de Staline à ses enfants enfin réconciliés de l'Est et de l'Ouest (new edition)
La Résistance au christianisme, Les Hérésies des origines au XVIIIe. siècle
Dictionnaire de citations pour servir au divertissement et à l'intelligence du temps
Pour une Internationale du genre humain
Pour l'abolition de la société marchande. Pour une société vivante
'Préface' in L'Art de ne croire en rien suivi de Livre des trois imposteurs
Introduction 'Une oeuvre au futur' in Charles Fourier, Des Harmonies polygames en amour
Salut à Rabelais ! Une lecture au présent
'Pour inaugurer l'ère du vivant' in Quatuor pour une autre vie
Entre le deuil du monde et la joie de vivre
Ni pardon ni talion (La question de l'impunité dans les crimes contre l'humanité)
Lettre à mes enfants et aux enfants du monde à venir
Pour un dépassement de la religion

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Preface to: d'Holbach, Théologie portative ou Dictionnaire abrégé de la religion chrétienne.

did.unittitle: Le Eresie. Italian translation of Les Hérésies
The Everyday Eternity of Life, Translation of Quotidienne éternité de la vie (1992); Preface to the American edition of The Movement of the Free Spirit

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Translations by Donald Nicholson-Smith.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Translation of Histoire désinvolte du surréalisme (1977) by Donald Nicholson-Smith. Probably not final version, annotated: "Please do not use to set type."

did.unittitle: Unpublished correspondence of Raoul Vaneigem with Guy Debord

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: original autograph and typed letters signed, sent by Raoul Vaneigem to Guy Debord, as well as postcards, and a telegram. These originals were returned to Raoul Vaneigem, together with Guy Debord's letters to Raoul Vaneigem, by Alice Debord after the publication of Debord's correspondence in 8 volumes by Fayard, Paris.

did.unittitle: Unpublished correspondence of Guy Debord with Raoul Vaneigem

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: autograph postcards signed, sent from Paris, and mostly about texts for the review "Internationale Situationniste". Some postcards depict the column of the Place Vendôme.

did.unittitle: Photocopies of correspondence of Guy Debord with Raoul Vaneigem

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: photocopies of all letters, telegrams and postcards sent by Guy Debord to Raoul Vaneigem, as published in several volumes of the correspondence of Guy Debord (Fayard, Paris).

did.unittitle: Correspondence with other situationists and "sympathizing" individuals

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters from: Henri Lefebvre (22 December 1960); Michèle Bernstein (early 1960s); René Viénet (1963-1970); Denis Cheype, girlfriend of Guy Debord (1965); Guy Debord (28 July 1969); René Riesel (1970); René Riesel and René Viénet (14 January 1971), copy to Raoul Vaneigem of a letter to American activists; Paolo Salvadori (1971) and Raoul Vaneigem's rude answer; Loren Goldner (1971); Attila Kotanyi (13 March 1995), a letter triggered by Guy Debord's death, looking back on his situationist years and Debord's role; Donald Nicholson-Smith (1995), reflecting on Guy Debord's death; Gérard Berréby, publisher of Allia (early 1970s); letters from translators and authors.

did.unittitle: Letters from Belgian and French institutions concerning grants and scholarships; and a literary prize

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains two autograph letters and a card from Emilie Noulet (1892-1978). Emilie Noulet, one of the first women to be university professor in French literature in Belgium, promoted Raoul Vaneigem's master's thesis. Also contains autograph letters from Guy Galand (1951-1958), Raoul Vaneigem's best friend from his high school years. Contains drafts of letters by Raoul Vaneigem to Guy Galand, "Claudine", to an English girl.

did.unittitle: Correspondence with Raoul Vaneigem as an author

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters from readers, often unknown students and activists, reacting to Raoul Vaneigem's books. Also contains correspondence from other authors, such as Michel Onfray, political cartoonist Siné, translators Donald Nicholson-Smith and Pierre Gallissaires, and others.

did.unittitle: Correspondence with Raoul Vaneigem as an author

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters from readers, often unknown students and activists, reacting to Raoul Vaneigem's books. Also contains correspondence from other authors, such as Michel Onfray, political cartoonist Siné, translators Donald Nicholson-Smith and Pierre Gallissaires, and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters and postcards from friends and relatives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters and postcards from friends and relatives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains letters and postcards from friends and relatives.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: letters and postcards from friends and relatives.

did.unittitle: Postcards from Raoul Vaneigem to his parents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a collection of reviews of Raoul Vaneigem's books in newspapers and magazines.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a collection of reviews of Raoul Vaneigem's books in newspapers and magazines.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a collection of reviews of Raoul Vaneigem's books in newspapers and magazines.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains written interviews, as well as questions for interviews by François Bott and Sergio Ghilardi. Also contains the script for Résonances (2011), a film by Isabelle Le Guern.

did.unittitle: Press clippings and issues of newspapers, and magazines
Press clippings and issues of newspapers, and magazines
Articles devoted to the Situationist International

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains shorter texts published in reviews and exhibition catalogues. Includes "Carte blanche à Raoul Vaneigem."

did.unittitle: Pamphlets and ephemera of the Situationist International
Pamphlets and periodicals published by other groups and individuals

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted Fragile Material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Pamphlets and periodicals published by other groups and individuals
Publications by other groups or individuals

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains publications inspired by or associated with the Situationist International.

did.unittitle: Un modèle de fonctionnement social par étiage hiérarchique – La fluidité du pouvoir chez les Maasai, peuple pastoral de l'Est Africain

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a doctoral thesis by Marie-France Planeix, the mother of Raoul Vaneigem's sons Ariel and Tristan.

did.unittitle: Un modèle de fonctionnement social par étiage hiérarchique – La fluidité du pouvoir chez les Maasai, peuple pastoral de l'Est Africain.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a doctoral thesis by Marie-France Planeix, the mother of Raoul Vaneigem's sons Ariel and Tristan.

did.unittitle: Ariel Planeix. Les Zkara. Hétérodoxie et société dans le Maroc berbère

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a master's thesis by Ariel Planeix, son of Raoul Vaneigem and Marie-France Planeix.

did.unittitle: Cantico Novo. Das glückliche und fröhliche Lied der Antwort-nicht-Antwort. Musical von Phan Trat Quan und Tom Heilandt nach dem Buch "Déclaration des droits de l'être humain" und diversen Texten aus dem Werk von Raoul Vaneigem.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains a music score and lyrics for voice, from a musical based on Raoul Vaneigem texts.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted Fragile Material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

did.unittitle: Si tu danses. Who killed Romeo and Juliet?

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains text for a musical by Phan Trat Quan and Tom Heilandt, with lyrics based on quotes from Raoul Vaneigem and Julian Beck.

did.unittitle: Autographed and typed notes by other individuals

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains copied German poems, and reading notes on the Free Spirit, assumed to be by Marie-Paule Devos.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains invitations, announcements and other material.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Restricted Fragile Material. Reference copies of electronic files may be requested. Consult Access Services for further information.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains John Juin en Normandie booklet, with attached compact disc.

did.unittitle: School reports and Raoul Vaneigem as a young orator

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains Raoul Vaneigem's primary and high school reports. Also contains a press clipping from June 1946 describing the funeral of a 14-year old boy from Raoul Vaneigem's class, as well as a summary of the speech held by Raoul Vaneigem at the boy's grave.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains administrative papers recording Raoul Vaneigem's military service, including his id card as an officer. Also contains: two tactical notebooks, one of which includes a love letter from his first wife; tactics excerise sheets with drawings and a summary of tactic excercises; old photocopies of an "aide-mémoire de l'officier" with technical details of rifles, hand weapons and machine guns.

did.unittitle: Documents concerning Raoul Vaneigem's teaching activity

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains material concerning Raoul Vaneigem's full time teaching activity at the teacher training school of Nivelles (near Brussels) from October 1956 to his dismissal in January 1966, interrupted by his 1958-1959 military service.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also contains: texts distributed to students.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains papers on Apollinaire, Ponge, Desnos, Lorca, L'Evolution des doctrines post-marxistes, and short stories written by Raoul Vaneigem's sutdents.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: a three-page document on astrological themes (circa 1960s). Also contains: a tarot card session from 2008 January 3, which included Raoul Vaneigem, daughter Chiara, and his girlfield Vera. Numerological calculations of their three names are present, as well as notes regarding Raoul Vaneigem's family tree.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: original photographs, mainly black and white. Most photographs are either solo portraits of Raoul Vaneigem, or of Raoul Vaneigem within the company of friends or relatives. Other photographs include pictures of Vaneigem's house in France.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of Raoul Vaneigem's grandparents, parents, children, wives, girlfriends and others.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes photographs of Raoul Vaneigem's grandparents, parents, children, wives, girlfriends and others.

did.unittitle: Newspapers dating from Raoul Vaneigem's birth

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also contains: Paul Vaneigem's (Raoul's father) medal for fighting in the resistance to the German occupying forces during World War II; document concerning the execution, by the resistance, of his nephew who had been collaborating with the Germans.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains: documents mainly related to Raoul Vaneigem's mother and father. Specifically, their professional life. Also contains: souvenirs, as well as documents related to his parents' house, built in 1939.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains documents concerning Raoul Vaneigem's daughters, Ariane and Chiara, his sons Ariel and Tristan, Chiara's mother Brigitte Tack and Ariel and Tristan's mother Marie-France Planeix.

did.unittitle: Postcards addressed to Raoul Vaneigem's parents

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains postcards, kept as souvenirs by Raoul Vaneigem and his parents. Mostly acquired during travels abroad.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains documents concerning taxes, health insurance, pension funds, as well as membership cards for trade unions and libraries. Also contains a notary document regarding Raoul Vaneigem's father's inheritance.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains several versions of Raoul Vaneigem's CV and bibliography.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains drawings, some by Raoul Vaneigem, and others by his children and friends. Includes three portraits by artist Zazu.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains documents regarding Raoul Vaneigem's interest in travelling, food and wine.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains calling cards, and addresses of contacts. Also contains lists of names for review copies of Raoul Vaneigem's books.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains notes listing projects and meetings. Also contains weekly planners, post 1980.
